text.title: Modern Python 2026 — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when python-modern-2026 is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.reason: Root cause: Ruff flags 3.13 syntax as error on 3.10; mypy misses 3.13 features. Fix: Sync all four pins to one version.
Root cause: Many C extensions assume GIL; subtle data races and crashes. Fix: Stay on GIL build; revisit when ecosystem catches up.
Root cause: Different resolvers; lockfiles desync; CI uses one, dev uses other. Fix: Pick uv; delete poetry.lock and Pipfile.
Root cause: Syntax error on 3.13; only 3.14+ supports them. Fix: Use f-strings; revisit when on 3.14.
